message:
refactor(sql): extract scalar_functions.zig from executor.zig

Extract date/time, string, and math functions into a separate module:
- DatePart enum and date parsing utilities
- Date functions: funcExtract, funcDateTrunc, funcDateAdd, funcDateDiff, funcEpoch
- String functions: funcUpper, funcLower, funcLength, funcTrim
- Math functions: funcAbs, funcRound, funcFloor, funcCeil
- Type inference: ResultType enum, inferFunctionReturnType

Part of breaking down the 6,377-line executor.zig into smaller modules.
